eligible_applicant_type: Active members of the Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, or Coast Guard residing in Syracuse, New York
Discharged veterans residing in Syracuse, New York
Commissioned officers in eligible government sectors residing in Syracuse, New York
Veterans operating a business in Syracuse, New York
project_area: Veteran services, including grants for treatment courts, adaptive sports, cemetery grants, employment programs, transportation, conservation, and agricultural outreach
demographic_requirements: Veterans residing in Syracuse, New York, including active duty, discharged, commissioned officers, and veteran business owners
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants must be veterans or veteran business owners residing in Syracuse, New York. Specific programs may have additional criteria such as service branch, discharge status, or business operation.
